description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized, nude male figure standing upright on a round pedestal. The figure is rendered in a classical Greco-Roman style, with well-defined musculature and curly hair. The left arm is raised and bent at the elbow, with the hand open and palm facing outward, while the right arm hangs naturally at the side. The surface of the sculpture has a metallic bronze finish, giving it a lustrous and slightly reflective appearance. The base is simple and circular, providing stable support for the figure. The overall impression is one of elegance and timeless artistry, reminiscent of ancient bronze statues.
description: A bronze-finished, life-sized classical male nude sculpture standing on a round pedestal with one arm raised. The figure features detailed musculature and a lustrous metallic surface.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the detailed face, chest, and the left arm raised with the palm outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curvature of the torso, and the extended left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back musculature, the back of the head, and both arms, with the left arm raised.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm hanging down and the side profile of the body and head.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is plain and featureless.
